name: Stickman Merge 2
description: Combine weapons in the action game "Stickman: Weapon Combination" and create more powerful guns, and then go to the shooting range against enemy stickmen. Prepare your arsenal, upgrade your pistol, collect all bonuses and become the best shooter in the city. How powerful can you create a weapon in the fight against enemies? Stay here to find out!
instructions: Control in the game Stickman Weapon Combination on the computer is carried out with the mouse and on the touch screens with the help of taps The goal of Stick Merge is to combine different types of weapons to create more powerful cannons and ultimat
